# Marta do Vale

> Lisbon-based art director and production designer. In cinema since 2011,
> in advertising since 2016. Cannes Critics' Week credit on Diamantino
> (2018). Direct line — no agent.

## About

Lisbon-born, August 1990. Marta trained as a scenographer — Escola
Artística António Arroio, then a bachelor's in Scenography at Faculdade
de Arquitetura, then a master's in Scene Design at ESTC. She came in as
an architect of the stage and the frame, not from graphics.

In the cinema arts department since 2011, in advertising since 2016.
Pela Boca Morre o Peixe took Best Short at MOTELx 2014. Todos os Sonhos
do Mundo, produced by Paulo Branco's Leopardo Filmes, followed in 2017.
Then Diamantino — the political satire she helped dress — won the Grand
Prize at Semaine de la Critique, Cannes 2018. Direct line. No agent.

## Selected cinema

- **Diamantino** (2018) — Art Department, dir. Gabriel Abrantes & Daniel
  Schmidt. Grand Prize, Semaine de la Critique, Cannes 2018.
  <https://www.imdb.com/title/tt6522668/>
- **All the Dreams in the World / Todos os Sonhos do Mundo** (2017) —
  Production Designer (with Mathieu Lazare Fromenteze), dir. Laurence
  Ferreira Barbosa. Prod. Paulo Branco / Leopardo Filmes.
  <https://leopardofilmes.com/en/film/all-the-dreams-in-the-world/>
- **Pela Boca Morre o Peixe** (2014) — Art Department, dir. João P.
  Nunes. Best Short Film, MOTELx 2014.
  <https://www.imdb.com/title/tt3728222/>
- **Lura** (2013) — Art Director, dir. Luís Brás.
  <https://www.imdb.com/title/tt3531016/>

## Selected commercial work

Brands: Audi, Burger King, Adidas × SL Benfica, Auchan, BPI, Delta Q,
Super Bock, Cetelem, Cornetto, Polícia Judiciária, Bricomarché,
GoldEnergy, Buondi, Bollycão, Sport TV, Rubis Gás, NOA Pflanzlich.
Recent highlight: Audi e-tron GT quattro with Olympic decathlete Leo
Neugebauer.
